summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 12→Jul 18 vs Jul 5→Jul 11* · Revenue +17% (1,231,499 vs 1,055,778 EGP) · Spend +4% · ROAS 6.2 (+12%).
   • CPC: 2.17 → 2.12 EGP (-2%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.07% → 0.95% (-11%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,130 → 1,376 EGP (+22%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *AOV 58%* of the move (helped, +220,170 EGP)  ·  *CVR 35%* of the move (hurt, -154,939 EGP)  ·  *CPC 7%* of the move (helped, +4,692 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +22%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *220,170 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +12%.
     Revenue +17% because spend +4%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *OURKIDS PJS SCALING LEBLEB MOA*, its AOV went 3101.8 EGP→1178.12 EGP on 5,973 EGP spend (~22% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 12→Jul 18 vs Jul 5→Jul 11* · Revenue +95% (222,754 vs 113,976 EGP) · Spend +80% · ROAS 4.22 (+9%).
   • CPC: 9.64 → 9.25 EGP (-4%, ~flat)
   • CVR: 1.77% → 2.57% (+45%, up (good))
   • AOV: 2,111 → 1,515 EGP (-28%, down (drag))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 50%* of the move (helped, +69,217 EGP)  ·  *AOV 44%* of the move (hurt, -87,612 EGP)  ·  *CPC 6%* of the move (helped, +2,227 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* rose +45%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *69,217 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +9%.
     Revenue +95% because spend +80%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255290390850011|swimwear new arrivals black button grid>, its CVR went 0.0%→3.17% on 6,144 EGP spend (~43% of the swing).
